Uses of Package
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces

Packages that use fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces
Package
Description
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.connectors
 
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces

  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components
    Class
    Description
    GossipImplementationI
    The interface GossipImplementationI declares the signatures of the methods to be implemented by the components participating in the gossip protocol.
    GossipMessageI
    The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.
    GossipReceiverI
    The interface GossipReceiverI declares the signatures of the method to be implemented by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.connectors
    Class
    Description
    GossipMessageI
    The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.
    GossipSenderCI
    The component interface GossipSenderCI declares the signatures of the service called by a component playing the sender role in the gossip protocol.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces
    Class
    Description
    GossipMessageI
    The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.
    GossipReceiverI
    The interface GossipReceiverI declares the signatures of the method to be implemented by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.messages
    Class
    Description
    EmitterAwareGossipMessageI
    Project-local extension of the frozen GossipMessageI that exposes the immediate gossip emitter URI.
    GossipMessageI
    The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.
  • Classes in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.interfaces used by fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.gossip.ports
    Class
    Description
    GossipMessageI
    The interface GossipMessageI declares the signatures of methods that must be implemented by messages exchanged among the participants in the gossip protocol.
    GossipReceiverCI
    The component interface GossipReceiverCI declares the signatures of the service offered by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.
    GossipReceiverI
    The interface GossipReceiverI declares the signatures of the method to be implemented by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.
    GossipSenderCI
    The component interface GossipSenderCI declares the signatures of the service called by a component playing the sender role in the gossip protocol.

    Class
    Description
    GossipImplementationI
    The interface GossipImplementationI declares the signatures of the methods to be implemented by the components participating in the gossip protocol.
    GossipReceiverI
    The interface GossipReceiverI declares the signatures of the method to be implemented by a component playing the receiver role in the gossip protocol.

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
